candidates.why: Direct top-line operating revenue row; best match for revenue/sales.
Also a revenue total and identical in preview; useful as fallback if label changes by year.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Interest income, not sales/revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue rows as a priority list, with the more specific operating revenue label first.

candidates.why: Direct service/delivery cost and the best match to cost of sales for this business.
Small lease-related operating cost, not core cost of sales.

variables.notes: Selected the direct project delivery cost line as COGS/cost of sales.

candidates.why: This is direct project cost and fits COGS, so it should be excluded from SG&A.
Core operating overhead/personnel expense above EBIT; strong SG&A component.
Broad operating overhead bucket above EBIT; strong SG&A component.
R&D line exists only as supplemental below EBIT; per rules do not include in SG&A when only below-EBIT/supplemental.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Selected overhead component rows above EBIT and excluded COGS, D&A, amortization, and balancing rows. Did not include supplemental R&D because it appears only below EBIT.

candidates.why: Only explicit R&D-related row available; it is supplemental/below EBIT, so usable for XRD but not added to SG&A.

variables.notes: Mapped to the only dedicated R&D row available. It appears as a supplemental disclosure below EBIT, so it is not included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost total; less preferred because more granular recurring interest components exist.

candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense component.

Minority interest allocation, not finance cost.
Minority interest allocation, not finance cost.

candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of the lease-interest line; avoid double counting.
Equity line, not finance expense.
Equity line, not finance expense.
Liability balance, not period expense.
Liability balance, not period expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

candidates.why: Income statement associate earnings, not book equity.
Income allocation line, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the owners of the parent
candidates.why: Best match for parent/common book equity and excludes non-controlling interests.
This is minority/NCI, not parent equity.
Includes minority interest in at least one year; less preferred than parent equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the owners of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred parent-only equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution, not balance sheet NCI.
Income statement comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet NCI.
Direct balance sheet NCI label; useful fallback if naming changes.
Direct balance sheet minority interest/NCI label.
Income statement allocation, not balance sheet NCI.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet non-controlling interest labels as a priority list. Parent equity is separately mapped to avoid overlap.
